title: melleafy
description: Output contract for melleafy.json — the generated package manifest written by Step 3 (skeleton) and finalised by Step 6. Consumed by the export command (exporter.py:stage1_validate, stage2_load) and by downstream tooling that introspects the package. See mellea-fy-artifacts.md §`melleafy.json` finalisation (R20) for field semantics and mellea-fy-generate.md (around line 420) for the Step 3 skeleton.

manifest_version.description: Semver string >= 1.1.0. The pattern accepts 1.X.Y for X >= 1 and any major >= 2 (multi-digit majors included); 1.0.* and 0.*.* are rejected. Hard-required by exporter.py:stage1_validate.

entry_signature.description: AST-extracted signature of the generated pipeline.py:run_pipeline function (e.g. 'run_pipeline(ticket_text: str, priority: str = \'normal\') -> TriageReport'). Hard-required by the export command — populated in Step 6 from the generated source, not LLM-authored.

package_name.description: Snake_case package directory name with the mandatory `_mellea` suffix (e.g. 'triage_mellea'). Hard-required by exporter.py:stage2_load.

format_version.description: Soft-required (warn if absent). Format version of this manifest document (e.g. '1.0').

generated_at.description: Soft-required (warn if absent). ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the Step 3 skeleton write (re-set on Step 6 finalisation if the manifest is rewritten end-to-end).

melleafy_version.description: Soft-required (warn if absent). Version of the melleafy compiler that produced this manifest (e.g. '4.0.0').

source_runtime.description: Soft-required (warn if absent). Carried from classification.json:source_runtime (e.g. 'openclaw', 'crewai', 'agent_skills_std').

modality.description: Soft-required (warn if absent). Carried from classification.json:modality (e.g. 'synchronous_oneshot', 'review_gated').

archetype.description: Soft-required (warn if absent). Carried from classification.json:archetype (one of A, B, C, D1, D2, E).

categories_resolved.description: Soft-required (warn if absent). Keyed-object summary of dependency_plan.json grouped by category code. Rule 6-1 — MUST be a JSON object keyed by 'c1_identity'..'c9_scheduling'; MUST NOT be a JSON array. Each category key carries a {count, entries[]} record (and optionally disposition for single-disposition categories). Rule 6-2 — every entry under c1_identity must include a `description` field derived from the source element's content_summary (or content_full first sentence ≤ 200 chars).

declared_env_vars.description: Soft-required (warn if absent). Environment variables declared by C7 (credentials) and external_input C8 entries (e.g. ['SLACK_API_TOKEN', 'JIRA_API_KEY']).

pipeline_parameters.description: Soft-required (warn if absent). Parameters of pipeline.py:run_pipeline, in declaration order. Derived by AST inspection during Step 6 — must agree with entry_signature.

count.description: Number of plan entries in this category. Zero-count categories are still emitted with entries: [] (Rule 6-1).

disposition.description: Optional. The single disposition shared by all entries in this category (e.g. 'bundle' for c1_identity when every entry is bundled). Omit when entries have heterogeneous dispositions.

entries.description: List of resolved dependency entries for this category. May be empty.

entry_id.description: Cross-reference to dependency_plan.json:plan[].entry_id (not enforced by JSON Schema).

description.description: Required for c1_identity entries (Rule 6-2): content_summary of the source C1 element, or first sentence of content_full truncated to 200 chars. Optional for other categories — present only when the source element carries semantic content downstream consumers would use.

type.description: Type annotation as a Python source string (e.g. 'str', 'list[str]', 'TriageInput').

required.description: True when the parameter has no default value.

default.description: Optional. Default value as a JSON scalar. Present only when required is false. Cross-reference invariant (not enforced by JSON Schema): present iff required is false.
